nodes.label: Pcf
nodes.description: A Product (Carbon) Footprint represents the carbon footprint of a product with values as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder framework and the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: id
nodes.description: Mandatory: The product footprint identifier as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: specVersion
nodes.description: Mandatory: Version of the product footprint data specification as defined in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: partialFullPcf
nodes.preferredName: Partial Or Full PCF (Product Carbon Footprint)
nodes.description: Mandatory: Indicator for partial or full PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) declaration as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: precedingPfIds
nodes.description: Optional: Set of preceding PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) identifiers without duplicates as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder framework and the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD/ PACT initiative. Declared as "optional" in WBCSD, needs to be covered by application.

nodes.label: version
nodes.description: Mandatory: Version of the product (carbon) footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. In Catena-X for example set to "0" per default.

nodes.label: created
nodes.description: Mandatory: Timestamp of the creation of the Product (Carbon) Footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: status
nodes.description: Mandatory: Status indicator of a product (carbon) footprint as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, in Catena-X for example set to "Active" per default.

nodes.label: validityPeriodStart
nodes.description: Optional: Start of interval during which the product (carbon) footprint is declared as valid as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. If specified, the validity period start must be equal to or greater than the reference period end.

nodes.label: validityPeriodEnd
nodes.description: Optional: End of interval during which the product (carbon) footprint is declared as valid as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: comment
nodes.description: Optional: Additional information and instructions related to the calculation of the product (carbon) footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: companyName
nodes.description: Mandatory: Name of the product (carbon) footprint data owner as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: companyIds
nodes.description: Mandatory: Non-empty set of Uniform Resource Names (URN) representing company identifiers. Each value is supposed to uniquely identify the product (carbon) footprint data owner as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: productDescription
nodes.description: Optional: Free-form description of the product as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: productIds
nodes.description: Mandatory: Non-empty set of product identifiers. Each value is supposed to uniquely identify the product as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: productCategoryCpc
nodes.description: Mandatory: UN (United Nations) Product Classification Code (CPC - Central Classification Code) of a given product as specified the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, which will probably be declared as "optional" in a later WBCSD specification version. In Catena-X for example specified with default value "011-99000".

nodes.label: productNameCompany
nodes.description: Mandatory: Non-empty trade name of a product as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: pcf
nodes.description: A PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) represents the carbon footprint of a product and related data as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: pcfLegalStatement
nodes.description: Optional: Option for legal statement/ disclaimer as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: declaredUnit
nodes.description: Mandatory: Unit of analysis of a product in context of the PCF (product carbon footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. In Catena-X for example list of valid units includes "piece".

nodes.label: unitaryProductAmount
nodes.description: Mandatory: Amount of units contained within a product in context of the PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: productMassPerDeclaredUnit
nodes.description: Mandatory: Mass of a product per declared unit in context of the PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: exemptedEmissionsPercent
nodes.description: Mandatory: Percentage of emissions excluded from PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: exemptedEmissionsDescription
nodes.description: Optional: Rationale behind exclusion of specific PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) emissions as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: boundaryProcessesDescription
nodes.description: Optional: Processes attributable to each lifecycle stage as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: geographyCountrySubdivision
nodes.description: Optional: Subdivision of a country which must be an ISO 3166-2 subdivision code as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: geographyCountry
nodes.description: Optional: Two letter country code that must conform to data type ISO 3166CC as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: geographyRegionOrSubregion
nodes.description: Mandatory: Region according to list as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: referencePeriodStart
nodes.description: Mandatory: Start of time boundary for which a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) value is considered to be representative as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: referencePeriodEnd
nodes.description: Mandatory: End of time boundary for which a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) value is considered to be representative as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: crossSectoralStandardsUsed
nodes.description: Mandatory: Discloses the cross-sectoral standards applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: productOrSectorSpecificRules
nodes.description: Mandatory: Product or sector specific rules applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions, e.g. PCRs (Product Category Rules), including operators or publishers and according rule names as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: characterizationFactors
nodes.description: Mandatory: IPCC (Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change) version of the GWP (Global Warming Potential) characterization factors used for calculating the PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, in Catena-X for example specified by default with value "AR6".

nodes.label: allocationRulesDescription
nodes.description: Optional: Allocation rules used and underlying reasoning in context of a product carbon footprint as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, in Catena-X for example specified by default with value "In accordance with Catena-X PCF Rulebook".

nodes.label: allocationWasteIncineration
nodes.description: Mandatory: Allocation approach used for waste incineration with energy recovery as specified by the TFS (Together For Sustainability) initiative. In Catena-X for example must be specified by value "cut-off".

nodes.label: primaryDataShare
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Share of primary data in percent as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: secondaryEmissionFactorSources
nodes.description: Mandatory: Emission factors used for the PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) calculation as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: dqi
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Quantitative data quality indicators of a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: packagingEmissionsIncluded
nodes.description: Mandatory: Flag indicating whether packaging emissions are included in a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, in Catena-X for example value is "TRUE" per default.

nodes.label: pcfExcludingBiogenic
nodes.description: Mandatory: Product carbon footprint of a product excluding biogenic emissions as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: pcfIncludingBiogenic
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Product carbon footprint of a product including biogenic emissions as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. Optional value in current specification version but will be mandatory in future version.

nodes.label: fossilGhgEmissions
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Emissions from combustion of fossil sources as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. Identical to "pcfExcludingBiogenic", will be removed in later version.

nodes.label: biogenicCarbonEmissionsOtherThanCO2
nodes.preferredName: Biogenic Carbon Emissions Other Than CO2
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: GWP (Global Warming Potential) of biogenic CO2e-emissions in production phase which contain only GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions other than CO2 - excludes biogenic CO2. For specification see Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: biogenicCarbonWithdrawal
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Biogenic carbon content in the product converted to CO2e as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: dlucGhgEmissions
nodes.preferredName: dLUC (direct land use change) GHG (Greenhouse Gas) Emissions
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Direct land use change CO2e emissions in context of a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: luGhgEmissions
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Land use CO2 emissions in context of a product carbon footprint as specified by the TFS (Together For Sustainability) initiative. TFS specific extension.

nodes.label: aircraftGhgEmissions
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions resulting from aircraft engine usage for the transport of the product as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: packagingGhgEmissions
nodes.description: Optional: Emissions resulting from the packaging of the product as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, in Catena-X for example value is zero per default.

nodes.label: distributionStagePcfExcludingBiogenic
nodes.preferredName: Distribution Stage PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) Excluding Biogenic
nodes.description: Optional: Product carbon footprint for the distribution stage of a product excluding biogenic emissions as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: distributionStagePcfIncludingBiogenic
nodes.preferredName: Distribution Stage PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) Including Biogenic
nodes.description: Optional: Product carbon footprint for the distribution stage of a product including biogenic emissions as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: distributionStageFossilGhgEmissions
nodes.preferredName: Distribution Stage Fossil GHG (Greenhouse Gas) Emissions
nodes.description: Optional: Emissions from the combustion of fossil sources in the distribution stage as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: distributionStageBiogenicCarbonEmissionsOtherThanCO2
nodes.preferredName: Distribution Stage Biogenic Carbon Emissions Other Than CO2
nodes.description: Optional: GWP (Global Warming Potential) of biogenic CO2e-emissions in distribution phase which contain only GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions other than CO2 ? excludes biogenic CO2. For specification see Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: distributionStageBiogenicCarbonWithdrawal
nodes.description: Optional: GWP (Global Warming Potential) of biogenic CO2-withdrawal in distribution stage (biogenic CO2 contained in the product) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: distributionStageDlucGhgEmissions
nodes.preferredName: Distribution Stage dLUC (direct land use change) GHG (Greenhouse Gas) Emissions
nodes.description: Optional: Direct land use change CO2 emissions during distribution stage in context of a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook. TFS specific extension.

nodes.label: distributionStageLuGhgEmissions
nodes.preferredName: Distribution Stage LU (Land Use) GHG (Greenhouse Gas) Emissions
nodes.description: Optional: Land use CO2 emissions in context of a product carbon footprint as specified by the TFS (Together For Sustainability) initiative. TFS specific extension.

nodes.label: carbonContentTotal
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Total carbon content per declared unit in context of a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: fossilCarbonContent
nodes.description: Optional: Fossil carbon amount embodied in a product as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, in Catena-X for example specified by a calculated value.

nodes.label: biogenicCarbonContent
nodes.description: Mandatory starting 2025: Biogenic carbon amount embodied in a product as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: distributionStageAircraftGhgEmissions
nodes.description: Optional: GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions for the distribution stage resulting from aircraft engine usage for the transport of the product as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: crossSectoralStandard
nodes.description: Mandatory: Discloses a cross-sectoral standard applied for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: operator
nodes.preferredName: Operator or Publisher of Sector Specific Rules
nodes.description: Mandatory: Operator of PCR (Product Category Rule)/ PSR (Product Specific Rule) as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, in Catena-X for example must always be "Other".

nodes.label: ruleNames
nodes.preferredName: Product or Sector Specific Rule Names
nodes.description: Mandatory: Product-specific or sector-specific set of rules used for calculating or allocating GHG (Greenhouse Gas) emissions applied from the specified operator as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: otherOperatorName
nodes.description: Optional: Other operator of PCR (Product Category Rule)/ PSR (Product Specific Rule) as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension, in Catena-X for example specified by a default value.

nodes.label: emissionFactorDS
nodes.description: Mandatory: Emission factor data source used to calculate a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: coveragePercent
nodes.description: Optional: Percentage of PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) included in the data quality assessment based on the >5% emissions threshold as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. In Catena-X for example set to "100" per default.

nodes.label: technologicalDQR
nodes.description: Optional: Technological representativeness of the sources used for PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) calculation based on weighted average of all inputs representing >5% of PCF emissions. Specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: temporalDQR
nodes.description: Optional: Temporal representativeness of the sources used for PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) calculation based on weighted average of all inputs representing >5% of PCF emissions. Specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: geographicalDQR
nodes.description: Optional: Geographical representativeness of the sources used for PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) calculation based on weighted average of all inputs representing >5% of PCF emissions. Specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: completenessDQR
nodes.description: Optional: Completeness of the data collected for PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) calculation based on weighted average of all inputs representing >5% of PCF emissions. Specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: reliabilityDQR
nodes.description: Optional: Reliability of the data collected for PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) calculation based on weighted average of all inputs representing >5% of PCF emissions. Specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: ruleName
nodes.description: Name of a rule applied by a specific operator as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: PartialFullPcfCharacteristic
nodes.preferredName: Partial Or Full PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) Characteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining an indicator for partial or full PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) declaration as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook.

nodes.label: PfStatusCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining a status indicator of a product (carbon) footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. Enumeration with possible "Active" and "Deprecated".

nodes.label: DeclaredUnitCharacteristic
nodes.description: Unit of analysis of the product with accepted values as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. For countable products/ components/ materials, Catena-X for example adds the unit "piece" to the value list specified by WBCSD.

nodes.label: GeographyRegionOrSubregionCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining a list of valid geographic regions as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. In Catena-X for example "Global" has been added to the value list.

nodes.label: CharacterizationFactorsCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining the characterization factors of a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. In Catena-X for example specified by a default value.

nodes.label: AllocationWasteIncinerationCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining the allocation approach used for waste incineration as specified by the TFS (Together For Sustainability) initiative.

nodes.label: CrossSectoralStandardsUsedEnumerationCharacteristic
nodes.preferredName: Cross Sectoral Standards Used Enumeration Characteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining the enumeration of valid accounting standards used for product carbon footprint calculation as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: ProductOrSectorSpecificRuleOperator
nodes.preferredName: Product Or Sector Specific Rule Operator
nodes.description: Enumeration of PCR (Product Category Rule) operators as specified in the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative. WBCSD specific extension for example in Catena-X.

nodes.label: PrecedingPfIdsCharacteristic
nodes.preferredName: Previous PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) Identifiers Characteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining a non-empty set of product (carbon) footprint identifiers as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder framework and the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: IdSet
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining a set of URIs (Uniform Resource Identifiers).

nodes.label: CrossSectoralStandardSet
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining the list of valid accounting standards used for product carbon footprint calculation as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: ProductFootprintVersion
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining a product footprint version as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: DataQualityIndicators
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining the quantitative data quality indicators of a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: StrictlyPositiveDecimal
nodes.description: A positive, non-zero decimal.

nodes.label: DqiNumber
nodes.description: Decimal between 1 and 3 including

nodes.label: IdsTrait
nodes.description: Trait for URIs (Uniform Resource Identifiers).

nodes.label: PositiveDecimalWeightTrait
nodes.description: Trait for defining a decimal weight value declared in kg equal to or greater than zero.

nodes.label: PercentTrait
nodes.description: Trait for a decimal number in the range of and including 0 and 100.

nodes.label: PositiveEmissionsTrait
nodes.description: Trait for emissions equal to or greater than zero in context of a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint).

nodes.label: RuleNamesTrait
nodes.description: Trait for defining a non-empty set of rule names as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: DqiNumberTrait
nodes.description: Trait for defining a decimal between 1 and 3 including.

nodes.label: CarbonFootprint
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: PrecedingPfId
nodes.preferredName: Preceding PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) Identifier Entity
nodes.description: Entity for defining a preceding PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) identifier entity as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: PcfEntity
nodes.description: Entity for defining a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: CrossSectoralStandard
nodes.description: Entity for defining an accounting standard used for product carbon footprint calculation as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: ProductOrSectorSpecificRule
nodes.description: Entity for defining a product or sector specific rule of a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: EmissionFactorDS
nodes.description: Entity for defining an emission factor data source used to calculate a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: DataQualityIndicator
nodes.description: Entity for defining a quantitative data quality indicator of a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: RuleName
nodes.description: Name of a rule applied by a specified operator as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: NonEmptyString
nodes.description: Constraint for ensuring that a string has at least one character.

nodes.label: NonEmptySetConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for defining a non-empty set of URIs (Uniform Resource Identifieres).

nodes.label: RuleNamesConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for defining a non-empty set of rule names as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: ProductOrSectorSpecificRuleSet
nodes.preferredName: Product Or Sector Specific Rules Set
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining the set of product or sector specific rules of a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: EmissionFactorDSSet
nodes.preferredName: Emission Factor Data Sources Set Characteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining a set of emission factor sources used for calculating a product carbon footprint as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: RuleNamesCharacteristic
nodes.description: Non-empty set of rules applied by the specified operator. Defined by the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: PositiveOrNegativeEmission
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining (positive or negative) emissions in context of a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified by the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development) Pathfinder initiative.

nodes.label: PositiveDecimalWeight
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining a decimal weight value declared in unit kilogram equal to or greater than zero.

nodes.label: ExemptedEmissionsPercentCharacteristic
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining the percentage of emissions excluded from a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: Percent
nodes.description: Decimal number in the range of and including 0 and 100.

nodes.label: PositiveEmission
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining emissions expressed as a decimal equal to or greater than zero in context of a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: StrictlyPositiveDecimalConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for defining a positive, non-zero decimal.

nodes.label: PositiveDecimalConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for defining a decimal equal to or greater than zero.

nodes.label: ExemptedEmissionsPercentConstraint
nodes.description: Characteristic for defining the percentage of emissions excluded from a PCF (Product Carbon Footprint) as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: PercentConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for a decimal number in the range of and including 0 and 100.

nodes.label: PositiveEmissionConstraint
nodes.description: Only positive emission values (>0) are valid

nodes.label: DqiNumberConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for defining a decimal between 1 and 3 including.

nodes.label: GeographyCountrySubdivisionConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for defining a geography country subdivision in compliance to ISO 3166-2 as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.

nodes.label: GeographyCountryConstraint
nodes.description: Constraint for defining a geography country conform to ISO 3166CC as specified in the Catena-X PCF Rulebook in accordance with the technical specifications for PCF Data Exchange (Version 2.0.0) from the WBCSD (World Business Council for Sustainable Development)/ PACT initiative.
